items.title: Build gates on the touched hook
items.precondition: Local repo with the useAppTelemetry change applied

items.title: Parked tab stops emitting heartbeats after ~2min idle
items.precondition: Dev deploy complete; logged in as a non-internal account (internal users are write-blocked)
steps: 1. Open a tracked page, open the network panel filtered to /api/app-telemetry
2. Do not touch mouse/keyboard for 3+ minutes, keep the tab visible
3. Confirm heartbeats stop arriving after ~2.5 minutes (the tick after the 2-min grace)
4. Move the mouse: heartbeats resume on the next 30s tick
items.expected: No unlimited heartbeat chain while idle; resume on interaction
items.notes: User verifies in own browser tab per established workflow.

items.title: No regression: session start, page views, tab switching
steps: 1. Fresh login: app.session_started and app.page_viewed still fire
2. Navigate between tracked pages: page_viewed per route, heartbeats counting
3. Switch away and back to the tab: counting resumes cleanly
items.expected: All existing telemetry events behave as before; only idle counting changed
